title: Potion Effect Icon
description: Make the potion icon the icon of effect
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nprt74qb/images/b55bfc2970483290aaa80ed9d4255e5ef796da4d.png)

This resource pack make the icon of potion the icon of effect.

Icon are from `mob_effect`, in other words the icon depends on the resource pack you use or default.

Long duration potion are represent with clock icon on bottom right.

Strong/level II potion are represent with a plus on bottom right.

Splash potions are represent with a gunpowder on top left.

Potion of the Turtle Master use the resistance icon.

Lingering potion are not modified as no one use them and I could not find a good icon.
